target:
# Great! The main page IS archived. Let's access it and look for screenshot links
# First fetch the main page content to find any screenshot-related links
curl -s --max-time 30 "http://web.archive.org/web/20080602074723/http://www.everestpoker.com:80/" 2>&1 | grep -i "screenshot\|screen\|image\|img\|software\|client\|download" | head -30
